pick.rationale: Villanova holds significantly superior advanced metrics with a KenPom rank of 33 and Torvik rank of 36 compared to Utah State's absence from the ratings system entirely. The Wildcats' Big East pedigree combined with their elite efficiency margin (+19.94) creates a clear advantage over a mid-major champion whose underlying performance indicators are unproven at this level. While betting lines suggest Utah State may have momentum or Villanova has injury concerns, the talent disparity reflected in national rankings makes Villanova the more reliable tournament selection.
